opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This dark, ugly mole on my back got caught on my shirt and partially ripped off. It's bleeding everywhere, and I'm terrified it's a melanoma that has just burst.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A dark warty spot on my back caught on a towel, partly tore off and bled — I'm scared it's skin cancer.

symptom_narrative.onset: present for years; caught on a towel 2 hours ago and partly tore off
symptom_narrative.character: a dark, warty, 'stuck-on' looking spot; now partly torn and oozing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: mild pain and bleeding; very anxious about cancer
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: stable for years; acute mechanical injury today
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I have several similar dark warty spots that have increased with age; this one has a rough warty surface and looks stuck-on; it hadn't changed before today

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: multiple dark warty spots on the trunk increasing with age

objective_data_offered.value: a ~1.5cm dark brown-black warty 'stuck-on' looking spot on the mid-back; the top half has torn off leaving a raw oozing base; the intact part has a rough warty surface; I have several similar spots
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot dermoscope or palpate for firmness

objective_data_offered.value: mild oozing that slows with firm pressure
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: on aspirin so oozes a bit more
